sourceBio: ceo @box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI
title: Aaron Levie · @levie

sentences.text: As we enter the era of AI agents, one of the defining questions is how you develop competitive advantage when your competitor has access to the same AI models and intelligence as you.

The companies that are able to best harness their internal institutional knowledge, existing data assets, and domain-specific workflows -- connected with AI -- will be those that are able to stay ahead in the future.
Whether a company decides to build out the tech stacks themselves, or leverage a variety of best-in-class tools is certainly one core variable.
But the key is to find the way that the enterprise can capture and protect the value created by their unique data, processes, and expertise over the long run.
Each industry will have their own version of this, and the competitive advantage will vary by vertical.

We’re increasingly seeing this at Box, where customers want to ensure that they can take advantage of their institutional knowledge and have the flexibility of bringing any AI model and intelligence to their data at any time.
This is a pattern that will increasingly become a core principle of strategy in the future.

paragraphs.zh: 当我们进入 AI agents（AI 代理）时代时，一个决定性的问题是：当你的竞争对手也能获得与你相同的 AI models（AI 模型）和智能能力时，你要如何建立竞争优势。那些最能调动自身内部 institutional knowledge（机构知识）、现有 data assets（数据资产）以及特定领域 workflows（工作流），并将其与 AI 连接起来的公司，才会是在未来能够保持领先的公司。企业是决定自行搭建 tech stacks（技术栈），还是利用各种 best-in-class tools（一流工具），这当然是一个核心变量。但关键在于，要找到一种方式，让企业能够长期获取并保护由其独特数据、流程和专业知识所创造的价值。每个行业都会有自己的对应版本，而竞争优势也会因 vertical（垂直行业）不同而不同。我们在 Box 越来越多地看到这种情况：客户希望确保自己能够利用其 institutional knowledge，并且拥有灵活性，能够在任何时候将任何 AI model（AI 模型）和智能能力应用到他们的数据之上。这种模式将会越来越成为未来战略中的核心原则。

sentences.text: AWS has massive enterprise traction, with large committed contracts from enterprises.
So this partnership opens up both increased distribution for OpenAI’s models, but also likely drives an increase in token consumption overall across model providers.

paragraphs.zh: AWS 在企业市场拥有巨大的 traction（市场牵引力），并且获得了来自企业客户的大额 committed contracts（承诺型合同）。因此，这项合作不仅会为 OpenAI’s models 带来更广的分发渠道，也很可能会整体推动各家 model providers（模型提供商）的 token（令牌）消耗增长。
